items.description: fic preview: change font style based on own preferences
items.notes: would be nice to have an instant option to format like ao3. And upload field to add personal css. Cause you know... everyone has a personal css?

items.description: stupid left margin when collapsed builder panel
items.notes: does it break the functionality? no. does it annoy the fuck out of me? yes. At least I already know it's a problem with the collapsing animation.
same issue as the margin. panel animation create transparent ghost-panel instead of hiding it. It would be nice to at least have the panel collapse upwards on mobile.

items.description: possibility to connect ao3 fics directly by link
items.notes: only for not-locked fics obviously. would still download the html file locally to downloads folder. but gets rid of some manual steps.
I might be initializing something the wrong way?
not too complicated but if I have to stare at ao3 html any longer right now, I might cry.
currently needs double tab so selection can only ever be one word... that is not the functionality we desire, is it.
only on desktop, on annotation popup. users can also just open the one on their device though so it's not an immediate need.

items.status: if you wanna be fast af
items.notes: only on desktop, set short cuts for example for 'save annot' in the config panel.

I just assigned some colors and switched the theme colors around so this is definitely not great yet. Honelle said she would pick some good colors for me! Isn't it awesome to have such cool friends who take part in my random projects?
